message:
fix(tools): guard ReadTool image scaling against division-by-zero and simplify line counting

Two fixes in ReadTool:

1. Image scaling note: Guard against division-by-zero when displayed
   width w is 0 — emit a plain dimension note instead of computing
   an infinite scale factor.  Prevents panic or NaN in the coordinate
   mapping hint.

2. Displayed line counting: Replace manual split('\n').count() with
   the already-computed truncation.output_lines field, eliminating
   a redundant traversal and the off-by-one adjustment for trailing
   newlines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
